narrative:
Paris Township has 1,083 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
